reviews.review_description: There are too many shots, switching back and forth. The actor's eyes can't see the camera I'm watching. The actor's eyes don't look at me, and I don't have a sense of immersion. Just shoot with one lens for me.

reviews.review_title: Best Way to watch music performances
reviews.review_description: I started watching kpop videos and I am blown away. It is so immersive and soooo much fun. It feels like I am standing on stage with them. The lightstick is also very cute.  It's really so fun, I have been watching it for the last hour. Really hope more kpop groups come into this (especially bts or TXT). Overall great experience

This does everything it needs to be an enjoyable experience for everyone. So many apps neglect some basic things, but this one doesn't - you can download performances (great for slower connections), video quality is superb and lastly there's a ton of free content to get a taste of what the paid content is like.
I hope the application can increase the frequency of content updates in the future.
I can literally feel the stage in front of me!! it's that real!! Watching K-pop and Tomorrowlandin VR blew my mind. Best app on Quest 3! ;)

reviews.review_title: Take my money, it's worth it
reviews.review_description: And if you bring a real NewJeans performance, you can take as much of my money as you want from NewJeans, Huntrix, Twice, Idle, aespa, Blackpink

OMG this looks SO real, I'm actually freaking out.
It feels like they're right in front of me!!!!!
LOVE IT!
Amazing insane hight quality vr and 3d content!
